fieldGroups.label: Functional And Therapy Status
fieldGroups.description: GG/M functional scoring, therapy need, discipline frequency, and goals.

fieldGroups.label: Symptom And Body System Review
fieldGroups.description: Body-system review sections that QA checks for consistency and completeness.

fieldGroups.label: Risk And Safety Assessments
fieldGroups.description: Fall, wound, hospitalization, and safety-related risk tools.

fieldGroups.label: Care Plan And Coordination
fieldGroups.description: Plan-of-care orders, patient summary, skilled interventions, and care plan content.

fieldGroups.label: Supplementals And History
fieldGroups.description: Past medical history, caregiver support, living situation, immunizations, and supplementals.

fieldGroups.label: Low Priority Admin Reference
fieldGroups.description: Identity, agency, physician, and demographic reference values that should not dominate QA.

textSpans.text: PROCEDURE CM/SS - CASE MANAGEMENT DEPT CONSULT
04/03/26 1154 Ordering Doctor: Mohsin, Qazi Z DO
Admit Date: 03/27/26 CM Services Requested: Placement Acute Rehab
Home Health Ordered: Y Home Health Nrsg/Thrpy: Skilled Nrsg/Thrpy Visit
Documentation should reflect need in provider progress note.
Discontinue Midline, PICC, or Periph IV after Rx regimen is complete:
** Enter physician mnemonic in UPPER CASE or N\Partial Last Name & (F9) **

draftNarratives.label: Homebound Reason
draftNarratives.draft: The patient uses a walker, indicating a need for assistance with mobility, which supports the homebound status.

draftNarratives.label: Medical Necessity
draftNarratives.draft: The primary reason for home health care is essential (primary) hypertension.

draftNarratives.label: Patient Summary / Clinical Narrative
draftNarratives.draft: The patient, Kwasi Nyamekye, has been admitted for home health care following a hospital stay. The primary diagnosis is essential (primary) hypertension. The patient requires physical and occupational therapy as part of the care plan.

draftNarratives.label: Skilled Interventions
draftNarratives.draft: The patient requires physical and occupational therapy as part of the care plan.

draftNarratives.label: Plan For Next Visit
draftNarratives.draft: The plan for the next visit includes continued physical and occupational therapy.

draftNarratives.label: Care Plan Problems / Goals / Interventions
draftNarratives.draft: The care plan includes addressing the patient's hypertension and mobility needs through physical and occupational therapy.

draftNarratives.label: Patient / Caregiver Goals
draftNarratives.draft: The patient and caregiver goals include managing the patient's hypertension and improving mobility with the use of a walker.
